      @parent = (0..size).to_a
    end

      end

      root_x = find(x)

      end

      @heap = data.dup
      heapify
    end

    def heapify
      ( (@heap.length / 2) - 1 ).downto(0) do |i|
        sift_down(i)
      end
    end

    def sift_down(i)
      left = 2 * i + 1
      right = 2 * i + 2
      smallest = i
      if left < @heap.length && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.length && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      return if smallest == i
      @heap[i], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[i]
      sift_down(smallest)

      @heap[0] = @heap.pop
      sift_down(0)

      sift_up(@heap.length - 1)
    end

        i = parent

    componentMap[root] ||= []
    componentMap[root] << i
  end

  componentHeaps = Hash.new
  componentMap.each do |root, nodes|
    componentHeaps[root] = MinHeap.new(nodes)

  class DSU
    def initialize(size)

    end

      end

    end

      root_x = find(x)
      root_y = find(y)
      if root_x != root_y
        @parent[root_y] = root_x
      end
    end
  end

  class MinHeap
    attr_reader :heap

    def initialize(data)
      @heap = data.dup
      heapify
    end

    def heapify
      ( (@heap.length / 2) - 1 ).downto(0) do |i|
        sift_down(i)
      end
    end

    def sift_down(i)
      left = 2 * i + 1
      right = 2 * i + 2
      smallest = i
      if left < @heap.length && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.length && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      return if smallest == i
      @heap[i], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[i]
      sift_down(smallest)
    end

    def peek
      @heap[0]
    end

    def pop
      return nil if @heap.empty?
      val = @heap[0]
      @heap[0] = @heap.pop
      sift_down(0)
      val
    end

    def push(value)

      sift_up(@heap.length - 1)
    end

      parent = (i - 1) / 2
      while i > 0 && @heap[i] < @heap[parent]

        parent = (i - 1) / 2
      end
    end

    dsu.union(u, v)
  end

    root = dsu.find(i)
    componentMap[root] ||= []
    componentMap[root] << i
  end

    componentHeaps[root] = MinHeap.new(nodes)

def solve(c, connections, queries)
  class DSU
    def initialize(size)
      @parent = (0..size).to_a
    end

    def find(x)
      if @parent[x] != x
        @parent[x] = find(@parent[x])
      end
      @parent[x]
    end

    def union(x, y)
      root_x = find(x)
      root_y = find(y)
      if root_x != root_y
        @parent[root_y] = root_x
      end
    end
  end

  class MinHeap
    def initialize(data)
      @heap = data.dup
      heapify
    end

    def heapify
      for i in ((@heap.length - 1) / 2).downto(0)
        sift_down(i)
      end
    end

    def sift_down(i)
      left = 2 * i + 1
      right = 2 * i + 2
      smallest = i
      if left < @heap.length && @heap[left] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = left
      end
      if right < @heap.length && @heap[right] < @heap[smallest]
        smallest = right
      end
      if smallest != i
        @heap[i], @heap[smallest] = @heap[smallest], @heap[i]
        sift_down(smallest)
      end
    end

    def sift_up(i)
      parent = (i - 1) / 2
      while i > 0 && @heap[i] < @heap[parent]
        @heap[i], @heap[parent] = @heap[parent], @heap[i]
        i = parent
        parent = (i - 1) / 2
      end
    end

    def peek
      @heap[0]
    end

    def pop
      if @heap.empty?
        return nil
      end
      @heap[0], @heap[-1] = @heap[-1], @heap[0]
      value = @heap.pop
      sift_down(0)
      value
    end

    def push(value)
      @heap.push(value)
      sift_up(@heap.length - 1)
    end

    def size
      @heap.length
    end
  end

  dsu = DSU.new(c)
  connections.each do |u, v|
    dsu.union(u, v)
  end

  componentMap = Hash.new
  (1..c).each do |i|
    root = dsu.find(i)
    componentMap[root] ||= []
    componentMap[root] << i
  end

  componentHeaps = Hash.new
  componentMap.each do |root, nodes|
    componentHeaps[root] = MinHeap.new(nodes)
  end

  online = Array.new(c + 1, true)
  result = []

  queries.each do |query|
    type, x = query
    if type == 1
      if online[x]
        result << x
      else
        root = dsu.find(x)
        heap = componentHeaps[root]
        while heap.size > 0
          current = heap.peek
          if online[current]
            result << current
            break
          else
            heap.pop
          end
        end
        if heap.size == 0
          result << -1
        end
      end
    else
      online[x] = false
    end
  end

  result
end

  end

  components = Hash.new
  (1..c).each do |i|
    root = dsu.find(i)
    components[root] ||= []
    components[root] << i
  end

  component_heaps = Hash.new
  components.each do |root, nodes|
    component_heaps[root] = MinHeap.new(nodes)
  end

  online = Array.new(c + 1) { true }

  result = []
  queries.each do |type, x|
    if type == 1
      if online[x]
        result << x
      else
        root = dsu.find(x)
        heap = component_heaps[root]
        current = nil
        while heap.heap.length > 0
          current = heap.peek
          if online[current]
            result << current
            break
          else
            heap.pop
          end
        end
        result << -1 if current.nil?
      end
    else
      online[x] = false
    end
  end

  result
end
